zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Southwell於1531年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，他的父親Sir Richard Southwell30歲，母親Elizabeth Darcy32歲。他於大約1553年與Bridget Copley在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年4月8日在英國倫敦享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Southwell于1531年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，他的父亲Sir Richard Southwell30岁，母亲Elizabeth Darcy32岁。他于大约1553年与Bridget Copley在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年4月8日在英国倫敦享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Southwell was born in 1531, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, his father, Sir Richard Southwell, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Darcy, was 32. He married Bridget Copley about 1553, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 8 April 1609, in London, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Southwell est né en 1531, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Southwell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Darcy, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Bridget Copley environ 1553, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1609, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Southwell 1531 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Southwell 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Darcy 32. Er hat um 1553 in Essex, England Bridget Copley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1609 im Alter von 78 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Southwell è nato il nel 1531 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Southwell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Darcy, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Bridget Copley circa 1553, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1609, nel London, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Southwellが1531年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Southwellは30歳，母Elizabeth Darcyは32歳であった。約1553年にイギリスエセックスでBridget Copleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年4月8日にイギリスロンドンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Southwell(이)가 1531년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Southwell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Darcy(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1553년 영국 에세스에서 Bridget Copley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 4월 8일 영국 런던에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Southwell nasceu em 1531, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Southwell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Darcy, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridget Copley aproximadamente 1553, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1609, em London, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Southwell родился в 1531 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Southwell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Darcy, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridget Copley около 1553 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей. Он умер 8 апреля 1609 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.
